title: Takamatsu, Kagawa — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Takamatsu, Kagawa: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Takamatsu is a city in Kagawa with a population of 420,000. The gateway to Shikoku, famous for the stunning Ritsurin Garden, Sanuki udon noodles, and the Seto Inland Sea.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
